creator: aldis@bsdroot.lv
text:
On Wed, 29 Jun 2011 19:14:28 +0100
Chris Rees <crees@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Hey Aldis,
> 
> I've made a coupla small changes, including removing capitals from
> the port's directory (frowned upon).
> 
> I'm a little concerned by comments like #TODO and # Needs bsd.port.mk 
> patches -- I've grabbed the second, are you still going to follow up
> the first? I can reopen it if you like.
> 
> Chris
> 
> http://people.freebsd.org/~crees/patches/visualizationlibrary.shar
> 
Hi

I'd like to look at this in month or two.... I'm really tired of
university and stuff... I need some break from PC.

Don't remember what was about that TODO (maybe to add docs... or some
other distfiles...)

About patching bsd.port.mk, that's because it doesn't support FreeGlut,
bsd.port.mk only supports libglut, but VL won't work with it (Some
things at least, as far as I remember)

If you want I can give you RW access to mercurial repository
http://hg.bsdroot.lv/aldis/VisualizationLibrary
I just need you to send me public ssh key
-- 
Aldis Berjoza
  http://www.bsdroot.lv/
